title: Salesforce Platform Manager
responsibilities: Oversee health, scalability, and release integrity of Salesforce ecosystem
Serve as primary custodian of environments ensuring production stability
Establish Center of Excellence to enable product teams to deploy code safely
Manage full lifecycle of Salesforce releases including major seasonal updates
Manage continuous CI/CD pipelines using Copado
Support streamlining of release management and testing environments for Salesforce, Agentforce, and Data Cloud
Translate complex technical releases into business-friendly roadmaps
Work in Salesforce.com development environment with custom objects, workflows, triggers, SOQL & SOSL
Apply best practices and design patterns to Force.com platform applications
nice_to_have_skills: Data Cloud ingestion, modeling, and activation
Salesforce Certified Development Lifecycle and Deployment Designer
